title: AI Engineer
summary: Bringing AI engineering expertise to the fintech and payments space.
bullets: Role details coming soon — first week on the job.

title: Cloud Software Developer
team: Data Intelligence Services — AI Services Team
summary: Led AI application development, RAG pipeline engineering, and LLM evaluation for Oracle's global support and data intelligence products.
bullets: Designed and delivered a Knowledge Management AI application that transforms customer-support interactions into structured knowledge base articles (title, cause, symptoms, solution) for a customer-facing portal. Built from the ground up with summarization for agent handoffs.

Boosted existing RAG API answer correctness by ~30% (50% → 80%) by redesigning chunking mechanisms and integrating new data sources, significantly improving response quality across global support queries.

Developed a RAG evaluation framework to test queries against golden datasets, producing detailed metrics (relevancy, correctness, completeness, context faithfulness, hallucination rate). Sole engineer — designed and implemented integrations across multiple RAG APIs and OCI-hosted LLMs.

Deployed a customized fork of Open Web UI on internal platforms with custom pipe class, SSE streaming, query rewriting, and per-product routing/system prompts — integrating Oracle Database and RAG services to support multiple business units.
Built embedding pipelines using Cohere Embed 4 with multi-source data ingestion, hashing-based sync strategies, and staging into RAG tables backed by Oracle ADW/ADB using cosine similarity.
Integrated Langfuse and Langsmith for APM tracing; built evaluation frameworks supporting both bring-your-own-data mapping and LLM-as-judge trace-based evaluation.
Implemented IAM, identity domain, and OAuth2 authentication; configured OCI Vault/secret service, VCN, ACLs, and security lists for secure AI service deployment.
Served as acting interim manager, coordinating a globally distributed team to deliver multiple projects in parallel.
Led onboarding for 10 engineers (including 3 new hires), providing technical guidance and accelerating ramp-up.
Provisioned AI infrastructure with Terraform, rapidly onboarding partners to OCI for AI experimentation and deployment.

title: Cloud Software Developer
team: GBU Application Engineering Services — Shared Services Team
summary: Designed and maintained Java backend APIs and cloud-native services powering shared infrastructure across Oracle's Global Business Units.
bullets: Designed and maintained Java + Micronaut backend APIs powering shared services across Oracle's Global Business Units.
Developed GitLab CI/CD pipelines automating builds, testing, scanning, deployments, and release notes — reducing manual intervention between releases.
Integrated OCI services (Oracle DB, Object Storage, Events, Streams, Distributed Tracing, APM) to deliver scalable, cloud-native services.
Enhanced test coverage with unit, integration, and performance tests.
Mentored junior developers and interns, providing guidance in debugging, clean code practices, and application development.
Deployed and maintained containerized applications via Kubernetes and Docker, ensuring uptime and scalability.

title: Full-Stack Application Developer
summary: Built and modernized web applications serving thousands of students and faculty, dramatically reducing administrative manual workload.
bullets: Built web applications and dynamic forms that streamlined student services and internal operations, drastically reducing manual workload for administrative staff.
Delivered full-stack applications using Python, PHP, and Java with complex SQL integrations across Oracle, MySQL, and Postgres databases.
Refactored and modernized legacy codebases, improving maintainability and performance.
Designed and deployed public-facing apps serving thousands of students and faculty, ensuring high availability and user-friendly experiences.
Provisioned and administered virtual machines to host Python applications.
